dict.string: Atlas connects to your Colmi R10 ring to read live heart-rate and motion for the liveness gate. Raw data is encrypted on this device and never leaves it.
Atlas captures depth-checked, provenanced photos and your enrolment face/depth anchor. Capture happens inside the attested app flow.
Atlas uses Face ID to gate the Secure Enclave authority and the in-person enrolment ritual.
Atlas fuses ambient sound level (loudness only, not recorded) into a live timing signal that schedules cryptographic draws. Audio is never stored and never enters a key.
Atlas fuses accelerometer, gyroscope, magnetometer and barometer motion into a live timing/gating signal. Motion data times draws and gates the ratchet; it never enters a key.
Atlas connects to the Mac node on the local network for the two-phone run.
